topics.name: 平移
topics.subject: math

prerequisites.reason: Master 平面直角坐标系 before 平移; it supplies the foundation used by later steps.

related.reason: 轴对称 extends 平移 in the math learning path.
Translation is used in shortest-path geometry problems to align broken segments and convert them into a straight-line distance.
Translation preserves direction and orientation, while rotation changes direction around a center; mixing them gives the wrong transformation rule.
A geometric translation becomes a coordinate rule by adding the same horizontal and vertical offsets to every point.
